violations.description: NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Ice noted behind and beneath walkin freezer unit of walkin freeezer needs repair. Some shelving inside walkin cooler noted not in good repair.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Reachin prep cooler noted with no thermometer inside.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some ceiling tiles in dining area noted wet-stained need replacement. (Also-repair any water leaks above these tiles) A couple ceiling tiles noted missing in back prep area need replaced. Ceiling light covers and vent covers in back prep area need cleaning. Floor inside walkin freezer needs cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling vents and light covers in kitchen areas need cleaning. Ceiling fans in resttrooms need cleaning. Floor inside walkin freezer needs cleaning.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Some shelving located inside walkin cooler noted not in good repair rusting. Walkin freezer cooling unit noted leaking water causing ice buildup beneath needs repair.
